message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I have your account ending in ****1184 with a current amount due of 8400. For verification, confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
The last two digits are 02, but I still can’t make any payment right now.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Verification is complete. I have the account ending in ****1184 with a current amount due of 8400. You stated you cannot make any payment this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Verification is complete. I have the account ending in ****1184 with a current amount due of 8400. You stated you do not expect any income in the next 21 days. I will note ongoing hardship and hardship review needed. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

I understand, but I still can’t make any payment right now.

Based on what you’ve already shared, hardship review is the live path. I can’t push a payment plan if you have no income and can’t commit within 21 days.

If you want, I can route this for hardship review now. If an approved option becomes available later, we can follow up then.
I’ve already said I can’t pay right now, so please note that and route the hardship review.

Hardship review is noted. Based on the current policy, the live path is hardship review; the approved payment options are not a fit if you cannot commit within 21 days.

If your situation changes, the approved options are:
- Reduced closure: $7,728 due by 2026-04-23
- Structured plan: up to 2 payments, first due by 2026-04-21 and final due by 2026-05-09

If you want, I can keep this on hardship review and record that you cannot make a payment now.
Please note that I can’t make any payment right now, and keep it on hardship review.
